title: Crouse Health EAP Follow-Up: 244 Firefighters Served Over Five Years, $12,000 Budget Confirmed
summary: Follow-up on Crouse Health EAP agreement from Jan 7. Fire Chief provides data: 244 firefighters utilized services over past 5 years (~49/year). Union had been paying for Crouse services after city stopped funding. Council questions whether $12,000 annual budget is sufficient; Chief confirms based on Crouse negotiations. Contract includes renewal periods for future years. Item 22 withdrawn.

political_signal.description: Council and Fire Chief both advocate strongly for dedicated firefighter EAP program with Crouse Health
